name: @elizaos/plugin-agent-orchestrator
description: Canonical ElizaOS plugin for spawning and orchestrating coding agents via native Agent Client Protocol transports — combined with workspace lifecycle, GitHub integration, task share, runtime-driven sub-agent routing, and supporting services.
author: @stwd / 0xSolace

ELIZA_ACP_CLI.description: Path or command name for the legacy acpx command-wrapper transport when ELIZA_ACP_TRANSPORT=cli.

ELIZA_ACP_TRANSPORT.description: ACP transport mode. Native/direct uses the embedded TypeScript ACP client; cli/acpx keeps the legacy command-wrapper transport.

ELIZA_ACP_DEFAULT_AGENT.description: Default coding agent adapter for TASKS create/spawn_agent when the user or planner does not choose one. Supported defaults include elizaos, pi-agent, and opencode.

ELIZA_DEFAULT_AGENT_TYPE.description: Compatibility alias for the default coding agent adapter. Use elizaos, pi-agent, or opencode to switch the default code agent from settings.

ELIZA_AGENT_SELECTION_STRATEGY.description: Task-agent selection policy. fixed makes the configured default adapter authoritative; dynamic allows runtime selection when implemented.

ELIZA_ELIZAOS_ACP_COMMAND.description: Native ACP command used for ElizaOS coding-agent sessions when ELIZA_ACP_TRANSPORT=native.

ELIZA_PI_AGENT_ACP_COMMAND.description: Native ACP command used for Pi Agent sessions when ELIZA_ACP_TRANSPORT=native.

ELIZA_CODEX_ACP_COMMAND.description: Native ACP command used for Codex sessions when ELIZA_ACP_TRANSPORT=native. Pin this in production to avoid implicit package upgrades.

ELIZA_CODEX_ACP_SANDBOX_MODE.description: Optional Codex ACP sandbox_mode override. Accepted values: read-only, workspace-write, danger-full-access.

ELIZA_CODEX_ACP_NO_LANDLOCK_SANDBOX_MODE.description: Codex ACP sandbox_mode used when Linux Landlock is unavailable.

ELIZA_CODEX_ACP_APPROVAL_POLICY.description: Optional Codex ACP approval_policy override. The no-Landlock fallback defaults this to never when unset.

ELIZA_CODEX_ACP_LANDLOCK.description: Force Codex ACP Landlock detection for container deployments or tests. Accepted values include 1/true and 0/false. Unset means auto-detect.

ELIZA_CLAUDE_ACP_COMMAND.description: Native ACP command used for Claude sessions when ELIZA_ACP_TRANSPORT=native. Pin this in production to avoid implicit package upgrades.

ELIZA_OPENCODE_ACP_COMMAND.description: Native ACP command used for OpenCode sessions when ELIZA_ACP_TRANSPORT=native. Defaults to the bundled OpenCode shim when available, otherwise opencode acp.

ELIZA_ACP_FORMAT.description: Agent Client Protocol event format expected from legacy transports.

ACPX_DEFAULT_TIMEOUT_MS.description: Default timeout in milliseconds for ACP prompt/session calls when an action does not provide a timeout.

ACPX_APPROVE_ALL.description: When true, defaults ACP sessions to the approve-all approval preset unless an action overrides approvalPreset.

ACPX_NO_TERMINAL.description: When true, passes --no-terminal so coding agents communicate through ACP events rather than terminal UI.

ACPX_DEFAULT_CWD.description: Default working directory for ACP sessions when an action does not provide workdir.

platformDetails.node: Node.js subprocess integration available via exports.node; browser export is a compatibility shim for package resolution.
